sources.name: Google Developer Documentation Style Guide
sources.assessmentDetail: Highly effective. All 5 recommendations (REC-001 through REC-004, REC-015) were cited across 5 tasks. REC-001 (concise first sentence for API classes) was the most widely cited recommendation (5 tasks). REC-013 (terminology consistency) was cited in 8 tasks. REC-015 (backtick formatting) in 5 tasks. Google's API reference style guide is the most impactful source for this documentation domain. Effective. Reinforced REC-014 code sample patterns.

sources.name: Diátaxis Documentation Framework
sources.assessmentDetail: Tutorials: Low effectiveness for this run. REC-006 and REC-018 (DancingGoat tutorial guidance) were unused — no DancingGoat tutorial tasks in this pipeline run. REC-007 (minimize concept explanation in tutorials) was not directly cited. Only REC-018 had marginal applicability. Tutorial-focused sources are less relevant when the pipeline is updating reference and how-to pages.; How-to: Highly effective. REC-008 (user-perspective problem framing), REC-009 (assume-able context), REC-016 (authentication flow documentation) all used. REC-016 was particularly valuable — cited in 4 tasks (TASK-003 through TASK-005, plus TASK-008) covering authentication page updates.; Reference: Effective. REC-012 (ContentAccessSettings reference structure) was cited in 5 tasks dealing with the three-tier access model.

sources.name: Microsoft Writing Style Guide
sources.assessmentDetail: Step-by-step: Effective for business-user tasks. REC-010 (location-before-action for UI procedures) and REC-011 (arrow notation for nav paths) were essential for the 3 business-user page updates.; Reference: Effective. REC-005 (standard API reference section order) was adapted to fit Kentico invariants and used in 2 reference page tasks.; Code: Highly effective. REC-014 (simplest scenario first for code examples) was the second most widely cited recommendation (7 tasks). REC-017 (assume working environment in how-tos) was useful for establishing baseline context.

sources.name: Kentico Xperience admin UI component reference — icon classes, interaction verbs, field behaviors
sources.rationale: Business-user pages (TASK-011, TASK-012, TASK-013) faced unique challenges around UI interaction vocabulary and icon accuracy that weren't covered by any research source. A Kentico-specific admin UI style reference would help.
